heatmap.netHint: Signed labels show who controls the square more strongly.
heatmap.splitHint: Labels show white:black control counts for contested squares.
heatmap.valueGuideBody: These numbers are not engine eval. They show the control difference on a square.
heatmap.valuePlusExample: white has 4 more attackers on that square than black.
heatmap.valueMinusExample: black has 5 more attackers on that square than white.
heatmap.netExample: In NET mode, positive means white pressure and negative means black pressure.
heatmap.splitExample: In SPLIT mode, a 3:1 label means 3 white attacks and 1 black attack.
heatmap.traceHint: Right-click a board square to reveal pieces influencing that square.
heatmap.traceKeyboardHint: Esc clears selection, I toggles trace arrows.
heatmap.traceHidden: Trace arrows are hidden. Press I to show them.

inputs.firstLoadPgn: Load a PGN with moves first

analysis.sleuthEvalHidden: Sleuth mode active. Reveal analysis to inspect evaluation chart.
analysis.sleuthLinesHidden: Sleuth mode active. Reveal analysis to view engine lines.
